notes: Works fine with DXVK. Tested in 4k on Plasma Wayland. The game did close with an error message but worked well.
title: Switchblade

notes: Run perfectly out of the box , no connection error to play online and the framerate is stable but i can't reach 60 frame per second on ultra settings and change to lower details don't take effect , maybe due to my cpu "AMD FX 8350". generaly i reach 45 / 50 frame per second . to keep in mind that the game is in early access and has high requirements at this time.
title: Switchblade
